name: Steelcase Inc.
description: Steelcase Inc. is a global design and thought leader in the office furniture industry, specializing in innovative furnishings, architectural systems, and workplace technologies. Founded in 1912 and headquartered in Grand Rapids, Michigan, the company conducts extensive research on workplace behavior to create environments that help people do their best work. Steelcase serves a diverse range of sectors, including corporate offices, healthcare facilities, and educational institutions, offering solutions that enhance productivity, collaboration, and well-being through a broad portfolio of brands and sustainable design practices.
